metadata.description: Plugins for everyday engineering work: team communication, shepherding PRs to merge, code review. Designed to be installed as a set on any orchestrator that ships code.

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Send and read Slack messages as yourself (no bot badge). DMs, channels, group DMs, threads, reactions, file uploads, search, recent activity. OAuth user token in macOS Keychain.

plugins.name: pr-merge
plugins.description: Drive a GitHub PR all the way to merged. Address review comments, fix failing CI, keep the branch on top of base, set auto-merge, monitor until it lands.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Review a PR (or a local diff) for correctness, design, and project-convention fit. Produces structured feedback an author can act on directly.
